response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Tokino Sora as the performer and the event as the 9th Anniversary Party. 2. Divided the video into a talk segment and a performance segment. 3. Identified the song '決意のソラへ' via on-screen text during the performance segment. 4. Searched for official lyrics for '決意のソラへ' using the credited composer/lyricist names (Minami Matsumoto/Ayato Fujiwara). 5. Since no official online lyrics were found (as the song is original to the video), transcribed the lyrics directly from the on-screen subtitles for the provided song segment.
response.global_summary: The video features Tokino Sora discussing her 9th anniversary party and the television commercial for her new song. It concludes with a full vocal performance of her original song 'Ketsui no Sora e'.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora talks about the 'Tokino Sora 9th Anniversary Party' and the television commercial for her new song.
Tokino Sora performs her original song 'Ketsui no Sora e'. On-screen text credits the lyrics to Minami Matsumoto and the composition/arrangement to Ayato Fujiwara.
